assertions.name: large launch returned a terminal session
sessions list exposes identity, workspace, agent, and state
headless read returns the agent acknowledgement
workspaces create forwards attachment bytes into its inline agent
assertions.detail: workspace, inline agent result, uploaded bytes, and resolved host path agree

assertions.name: multiline stdin remains one semantic prompt
read and send adopt a daemon-owned session after host restart
assertions.detail: same terminal id, exact follow-up, final state idle

assertions.name: wait timeout is a non-zero CLI result
immediate exec failure cannot report false success
unknown sessions fail without spawning replacements
exited sessions are not silently recreated
assertions.detail: send observed exited; subsequent read failed
